    for i in range(1, n):
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]:
            left_inc[i] = left_inc[i-1] + 1
        else:
            left_inc[i] = 1

    left_dec = [1] * n
    for i in range(1, n):
        if nums[i] < nums[i-1]:
            left_dec[i] = left_dec[i-1] + 1
        else:
            left_dec[i] = 1

    right_inc = [1] * n
    for i in range(n-2, -1, -1):
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]:
            right_inc[i] = right_inc[i+1] + 1
        else:
            right_inc[i] = 1

    right_dec = [1] * n
    for i in range(n-2, -1, -1):
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]:
            right_dec[i] = right_dec[i+1] + 1
        else:
            right_dec[i] = 1

    prefix = [0] * (n + 1)
    for i in range(n):
        prefix[i+1] = prefix[i] + nums[i]

    max_sum = float('-inf')

    for p in range(n):
        if left_inc[p] >= 2 and right_dec[p] >= 2:
            q = p + right_dec[p] - 1
            if right_inc[q] >= 2:
                r = q + right_inc[q] - 1
                l = p - left_inc[p] + 1
                if l < p and q < r:
                    current_sum = prefix[r+1] - prefix[l]
                    if current_sum > max_sum:
                        max_sum = current_sum

    return max_sum

    n = len(nums)

            right_dec[i] = right_dec[i+1] +1

        else:

            right_dec[i] = 1

    prefix = [0]*(n+1)

            left_inc[i] = 1

    left_dec = [1]*n

    # Compute right_inc and right_dec

        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]:

            right_dec[i] = right_dec[i+1] +1
